title: kazakh mod
description: Did you ever want to go to the Kazakh culture and try horse meat? With this mod, you can do it and also try Kazakh national dish.
body:
# **DESCRIPTION**

If you ever dreamed to go into Kazakh culture, then this mod is going to make your dream come true because with this mod you can make Kazakh national dish called Beshparmak using dough, cooked horse meat and potato. You can make dough by putting wheat into the furnace.

# **This mod adds:**
### - Horse meat
### - Cooked horse meat
### - Dough
### - Beshbarmak (Kazakh national dish)
### - Kumys (horse milk)

# **OLD UPDATE ITEMS**

1. ![**cooked horse meat**](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3418931b3254fc410b45a226806591223293dcec_0.webp)
2. ![**raw horse meat**](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cc4b172c3eccf7808f6bed8724a9f959d5bf944_0.webp)
3. ![**dough**](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37f3ba232030ccb1815b6217813d01a036e96c5c_0.webp)

# **NEW UPDATE ITEMS**

1. ![**kumys**](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e541905520159c1b9fdc43e09b7d63b2232787eb_0.webp)
2. ![**beshbarmak model**](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d4b9d138157f4c4d7780ebdb0c554f0529c546b_0.webp)
